attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.SCHEDULE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.BILL_RATE_SCH_ID, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.JOB_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.RATE_SCH_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.SHARE_ACROSS_OU_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL,
(
select ORGANIZATION_ID ,STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL
minus
select ORGANIZATION_ID ,STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID = STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.ORGANIZATION_ID 
 and ACM.STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE=STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RATE_SCDLS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_STD_BILL_RTE_SCHDL_ALL)
